name: No-Bake Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chocolate chips in a small microwave-safe bowl. Microwave at high for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes, stirring occasionally until melted and smooth.
2. Set aside to cool completely.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese with sugar until creamy.
4. Gradually add butter on low speed, then blend in the melted chocolate mixture.
5. Fold in whipped topping until well blended.
6. Spoon into prepared graham cracker crust.
7. Cover and refrigerate until firm.
